conservative.name: Warning Shot
conservative.requirements: Ranged weapon equipped, not engaged with an enemy, target within close range, target declares an action against an ally

success.description: You hit for -2 damage and all allies in the engagement may remove 1 recharge token from any recharging action
As above, but your allies may remove 2 recharge tokens instead

boon.description: Allies engaged with target may recover 1 stress

bane.description: Allies engaged with target suffer one stress

chaosStar.description: An ally in the target's engagement suffers 1 wound due to your hasty aim (GM's choice)

reckless.name: Warning Shot
reckless.requirements: Ranged weapon equipped, not engaged with an enemy, target within close range, target declares an action or spends a maneouver to move

success.description: You hit for -1 damage, startling your target. You my add to his declared action or force him to spend 1 additional fatigue per movement maneouver this turn
As above, but you hit for +1 damage

boon.description: The target adds to his next check
One ally within close range of the target gains to his next check

bane.description: You startle any allies engaged with the target, causing each 1 stress and 1 fatigue

chaosStar.description: All allies engaged with the target take 1 wound on account of your careless aim
